# KLAUDIUSH.md

<!-- Auto-generated by klaudiush suggest (v1.30.1). Do not edit. -->

## Commits

`git commit -s -S -m "type(scope): description"`

Types: build, chore, ci, docs, feat, fix, perf, refactor, revert, style, test
Title ≤50 chars. Body lines ≤72 chars.
Stage files before committing.
Use `ci(...)`/`test(...)` not `feat(ci)`/`fix(test)`.
No PR references (#123) in commit messages.
No AI attribution in commit messages.
Forbidden: \btmp/, \btmp\b

## Push

Always push to tracked branch.

## Branches

Format: `type/description` — types: build, chore, ci, docs, feat, fix, perf, refactor, style, test
Lowercase only.

## PRs

Title ≤50 chars. Body required.
Title style: conventional.
Types: build, chore, ci, docs, feat, fix, perf, refactor, revert, style, test
Forbidden: \btmp/, \btmp\b

## Linters

- \*.md → markdownlint + custom rules
- _.sh, _.bash → shellcheck
- \*.tf → tofu/terraform fmt + tflint
- .github/workflows/\*.yml → actionlint
- \*.go → gofumpt
- \*.py → ruff
- _.js, _.ts, _.jsx, _.tsx → oxlint
- \*.rs → rustfmt

## Secrets

Never commit API keys, tokens, passwords, or private keys.

## Custom Rules

- block-curvio-slash-run-pr-comments (\*): block

## Cascades

- FILE002 fix → expect FILE003
- FILE006 fix → expect FILE005
- FILE010 fix → expect FILE007
- FILE010 fix → expect FILE008
- GIT004 fix → expect GIT005
- GIT005 fix → expect GIT016
- GIT010 fix → expect GIT004
- GIT010 fix → expect GIT013
- GIT013 fix → expect GIT004
- GIT013 fix → expect GIT006
- GIT023 fix → expect FILE005
- SEC001 fix → expect SHELL001
- SEC004 fix → expect SHELL001
